parentQuestion: Which of the following are survival needs of the body?

scaffolds.q: Cells need oxygen to produce energy through cellular respiration.
scaffolds.explain: Oxygen is required for aerobic cellular respiration, which produces most of the ATP that cells need to function. Without oxygen, brain cells die within 4-6 minutes. Heart stops. Game over. Feel that urgency?

scaffolds.q: Water is the most abundant molecule in the human body.
scaffolds.explain: About 60-70% of the human body is water. It's essential as a solvent (every reaction happens IN water), transport medium (blood is mostly water), and participant in chemical reactions (hydrolysis, condensation). Now we arrive at the gorgeous part:: lose too much? Your blood thickens, your brain swells, your kidneys fail. Step into this world:.
